name: Domain
description: Creates domain records within a Drupal installation.

submodules.name: domain_access
submodules.purpose: Per-domain node/user access control: adds domain fields to content and gates who can see and edit it by domain.

submodules.name: domain_alias
submodules.purpose: Maps multiple host request patterns (aliases, wildcards, www/env variants) onto a single domain record.

submodules.name: domain_config
submodules.purpose: Domain- (and language-) specific configuration overrides, e.g. a different site name or theme per domain.

submodules.name: domain_config_ui
submodules.purpose: Admin UI for saving the domain-specific config overrides that domain_config stores.

submodules.name: domain_content
submodules.purpose: Per-domain content administration views so editors can review and manage content by assigned domain.

submodules.name: domain_source
submodules.purpose: Assigns each content item a canonical source domain and rewrites its outbound URLs to that domain.
